patterns.adapter_pattern: All adapters follow calling convention: adapter.nu <workdir> <prompt_file> <stdout_log> <stderr_log> [_memory_out]. Exit codes: 0=success, 75=transient (retry), 1+=failure
patterns.path_resolution: All adapters resolve relative paths to absolute before cd $workdir (lines 34-37)
patterns.output_pattern: Adapters that create files typically use mkdir output + save to output/result.md
patterns.test_pattern: Self-tests use --test flag and run_tests function

existing_implementations.description: Found ollama-local.nu adapter with JSON extraction logic (lines 66-111) but missing fallback for plain text responses
existing_implementations.bug_location: Line 111 in ollama-local.nu - needs fallback after JSON extraction block

test_verification.description: test-real-adapters.nu creates temp .cards dir, runs dispatcher, checks output/result.md exists and is non-empty
test_verification.assert_result_function: Lines 455-480 in scripts/test-real-adapters.nu verify result.md existence and content
